title: Citrusy Greek Cornmeal Stir-fry
description: This citrusy, dense, energizing Greek dish features fine yellow cornmeal, served as a halal-friendly breakfast option.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine cornmeal with vegetable oil and salt. Mix well until the cornmeal is evenly coated.
Add lemon juice and lime juice to the bowl; stir thoroughly to ensure all ingredients are combined properly.
Stir in minced garlic and red pepper flakes for extra flavor.
Transfer the mixture into a shallow air fryer basket, ensuring even distribution of ingredients.
Cook in preheated air fryer for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown. Shake the basket halfway through cooking time to ensure even browning.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
